Solution: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)
Specific Requirements: MSP will provide management and operational support for McGrath’s OCI environments and capacity management during US business hours. The MSP will implement and maintain OCI best practices across security, networking, identity, governance, and high availability. Functional Support Services: Provide assistance to Customer personnel involved in the daily interaction with the Customer environments. All work activity will be at the request and direction of the MSP SDM or through the MSP Help Desk. Tasks also include researching and resolving problems, developing and documenting recommendations, communicating with the Customer on the progress of work activities, scheduling support-related meetings or conference calls, supporting day-to-day operations, and/or performing administrative task. McGrath owns and manages its OCI tenancy, which currently hosts Autonomous Transaction Processing (ATP) databases, supporting services (such as FTP), and serves as the backend for our Oracle SaaS applications. Although our OCI footprint is relatively small, we lack deep in‑house operational expertise and are seeking an MSP to partner with us on day‑to‑day operations. The selected MSP will oversee operational management of the OCI tenancy, including security, cost management, performance monitoring, patching, connectivity support (including integrations with other cloud platforms such as Azure), and provisioning of new resources. All activities will be performed in close coordination with McGrath’s DevOps and Security teams. The total annual effort for this engagement is expected to be under 1,000 hours.
